paths.@supabase/supabase-js: Realtime/auth client SDKs forbidden outside src/lib/realtime/ or src/lib/auth/ (see ADR-0021).
paths.better-auth: Better Auth direct imports forbidden outside src/lib/auth/** (see ADR-0021).
paths.better-auth/client: Better Auth client imports forbidden outside src/lib/auth/** (see ADR-0021).
paths.better-auth/react: Better Auth React client imports forbidden outside src/lib/auth/** (see ADR-0021).
